name: Koru
summary: Integrate Koru resources with URI-addressable status and sync routes.
description: Koru is an if-uri urirun connector for integrate Koru resources with URI-addressable status and sync routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Koru capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use koru:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
